title: Scope & Active Span Management
description: Activating, querying, and closing scopes to track the currently active span in a request across DDTrace and OpenTracing adapters

actors.name: ApplicationDeveloper
actors.description: PHP application code that creates spans and manages their active lifecycle

actors.name: DDTraceTracer
actors.description: Internal DDTrace Tracer that owns the ScopeManager and triggers close on request end

actors.name: OpenTracingClient
actors.description: Code using the OpenTracing v1 or v2 API for vendor-neutral tracing

actors.name: CExtension
actors.description: DDTrace PHP C extension exposing root_span() and active_span() internal functions

use_cases.name: Activate Span
use_cases.description: Make a span the current active span by wrapping it in a Scope
implementations: DDTrace\ScopeManager::activate() — creates DDTrace\Scope, pushes to $scopes stack, tracks hostRootScopes if span context isHostRoot()
DDTrace\NoopScopeManager::activate() — returns NoopScope::create() (no-op)
DDTrace\OpenTracer\ScopeManager::activate(OTSpan) — unwraps OT span to DDTrace span, delegates to inner ScopeManager, wraps result in OT Scope
DDTrace\OpenTracer1\ScopeManager::activate(OTSpan, bool): OTScope — same as OpenTracer but with strict PHP 7 type hints

use_cases.name: Query Active Scope
use_cases.description: Retrieve the currently active Scope (and thereby the active Span) for a request
implementations: DDTrace\ScopeManager::getActive() — calls reconcileInternalAndUserland(), iterates scopes stack from top, skips finished spans, returns first active scope
DDTrace\NoopScopeManager::getActive() — always returns NoopScope::create()
DDTrace\OpenTracer\ScopeManager::getActive() — delegates to inner ScopeManager, wraps result in OT Scope wrapper
DDTrace\OpenTracer1\ScopeManager::getActive(): ?OTScope — same with strict return type

use_cases.name: Close Scope
use_cases.description: End the active period of a Scope, optionally finishing its wrapped Span
implementations: DDTrace\Scope::close() — if finishSpanOnClose=true calls span->finish(); then calls scopeManager->deactivate($this)
DDTrace\OpenTracer\Scope::close() — delegates to wrapped DDTrace Scope

use_cases.name: Close All Root Scopes
use_cases.description: At end of a request, close all host-root scopes (distributed tracing entry points)
implementations: DDTrace\ScopeManager::close() — iterates $hostRootScopes and calls scope->close() on each
DDTrace\NoopScopeManager::close() — no-op

use_cases.name: Reconcile Internal and Userland Spans
use_cases.description: Sync C-extension internal spans (root_span, active_span) with the PHP userland scope stack to ensure consistent active span view
implementations: Prunes finished scopes from the top of $scopes stack
If stack empty: calls root_span() + trace_id(), creates Scope from internal root span
Walks active_span() parent chain to create Scope wrappers for any internal spans not yet in userland stack
Returns the topmost (most recently activated) scope

use_cases.name: Deactivate Scope (Internal)
use_cases.description: Remove a specific scope from the active scope stack
implementations: Searches $scopes array for scope, removes with array_splice
Marks span's ddtrace_scope_activated flag to false via ObjectKVStore
If span context isHostRoot(), also removes from $hostRootScopes

use_cases.name: Get Primary Root Scope
use_cases.description: Retrieve the very first (outermost/root) scope of the request
implementations: Calls reconcileInternalAndUserland(), returns reset($scopes) or null

use_cases.name: Unwrap to Native ScopeManager
use_cases.description: Access the underlying DDTrace ScopeManager from an OpenTracing adapter (bridge/interop)
implementations: DDTrace\OpenTracer\ScopeManager::unwrapped() — returns inner $scopeManager
DDTrace\OpenTracer1\ScopeManager::unwrapped() — returns inner $scopeManager

key_relationships: DDTrace\ScopeManager aggregates hostRootScopes: DDTrace\Scope[] (subset for root spans)
important_notes: DEFAULT_FINISH_SPAN_ON_CLOSE = true: closing a Scope finishes its Span by default
ScopeManager.$scopes is an ordered stack; getActive() scans from the top (most recent)
reconcileInternalAndUserland() bridges C-ext DDTrace spans (root_span/active_span) into PHP userland — critical for correct parent-child relationships
hostRootScopes tracks distributed-tracing request entry points; ScopeManager::close() only closes these
NoopScopeManager is used when tracing is disabled — all operations are no-ops returning NoopScope
OpenTracer/OpenTracer1 adapters translate OT Span/Scope types ↔ DDTrace types; both support unwrapped() for interop
OpenTracer1 uses strict PHP type hints (bool, ?OTScope) for OT v1 compatibility; OpenTracer uses loose types for OT v2
